resources.string:
Accessibility Permission Required


To help manage loan agreements, DevicePolicyManager requests Accessibility access.


This will allow the app to:


1. Monitor specific app usage to enforce loan terms.


2. Guide users during repayment by limiting access to certain features if required.


3. Prevent misuse of device functionality during a loan default.


We do not collect personal data through this access. All actions are governed by your loan agreement.


Enabling this permission helps us ensure responsible use and support you through the repayment process.
